subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Hoagg in Jan. 1914
subcodes.first_line: When Jesus came the Jews called Him Beelzebub. I have always said that the believers will be blamed for this cause... Before leaving America I mentioned in many meetings the things that would happen.
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @suffering; rejection of Christ
